reasoning_content:
We are getting multiple errors due to duplicate lexer rules. The lexer file has been extended with more tokens, but then it also has duplicate definitions at the end. We need to remove the duplicate rules that appear after the first definition of Identifier and the fragments.

Looking at the file, we see that after the first set of rules (up to line 116) there is a duplicate set of rules starting at line 118. We should remove the entire duplicate section.

The duplicate section starts at line 118 and goes until line 162. We will remove that block.

But note: the original request was to remove the duplicate rules. We are replacing from the start of the duplicate fragment (line 118) to the end of the duplicate section (line 162) with an empty string.

However, the old_str provided in the last attempt did not match exactly because the file had changed. So let's try to remove the exact duplicate block.

But note: the duplicate block is:

   118	fragment
   119	IdentifierNondigit
   120	    :   Nondigit
   121	    ;
   122	
   123	fragment
   124	Nondigit
   125	    :   [a-zA-Z_]
   126	    ;
   127	
   128	fragment
   129	Digit
   130	    :   [0-9]
   131	    ;
   132	
   133	Constant
   134	    :   IntegerConstant
   135	    ;
   136	
   137	fragment
   138	IntegerConstant
   139	    :   DecimalConstant
   140	    |   OctalConstant
   141	    ;
   142	
   143	fragment
   144	DecimalConstant
   145	    :   NonzeroDigit Digit*
   146	    ;
   147	
   148	fragment
   149	OctalConstant
   150	    :   '0' OctalDigit*
   151	    ;
   152	
   153	
   154	fragment
   155	NonzeroDigit
   156	    :   [1-9]
   157	    ;
   158	
   159	fragment
   160	OctalDigit
   161	    :   [0-7]
   162	    ;

We will remove this entire block.

But note: the original non-duplicate definitions are already present above (lines 50 to 116). So we remove the duplicate.

Let's try again with the exact string of that block.
